title: ReplicationPolicy
description: Replication and retention policy for a Fog topic. This is a v0 scaffold; fields will evolve via ADRs.

replicas.description: Target replica count across distinct peers/neighborhoods.

minAcks.description: Minimum acknowledgements required for a write to be considered accepted (0 = fire-and-forget).

neighborhoods.description: Optional locality buckets (e.g. lan, household, region, friend-mesh) used for placement diversity.

retention.description: Retention hints for hot/cold storage and maximum topic size.
